source_notes.index_enriched: brand_inspiration entries upgraded with slug + display name + one-line description (+ category when available), extracted from each DESIGN.md frontmatter, so brands are selectable by mood/use-case instead of name only.
source_notes.brand_tags: Each brand carries multi-dimensional tags (industry/product_type/mood arrays + formality/density/scheme/era + best_for/avoid_for) from a controlled vocabulary, mirroring deck template.json. A brand can match multiple categories per dimension (many-to-many retrieval).
